belier.intro: The Moon has moved deeper into your sign, now at 24 degrees Aries, and the waning crescent light at 43 percent holds the quiet aftermath of yesterday's Last Quarter tension. Neptune retrograde remains in your first house, but its initial shock has softened into something more like a steady, inward question about who you are choosing to become. The Sun in Cancer continues to pull your attention toward emotional foundations, and the two together create a day for honest self-inquiry rather than external conquest.
belier.love: The urgency of yesterday's feelings gives way to something quieter and more considered. A relationship conversation benefits from this calmer tone; the words you were not ready to say yesterday may now arrive with more grace and less heat.
belier.work: Initiative-taking remains difficult under the waning crescent and Neptune's fog, but the clarity you gain through quiet observation today will inform better decisions tomorrow. Review old correspondence and unfinished notes with a patient eye.
belier.energy: Your fire burns with more steadiness than intensity today, a contained flame rather than a leaping one. This is a productive state for deep thinking and inner work, even if it does not look like action from the outside.
belier.intuition: Neptune retrograde in your first house continues to blur the boundary between your own feelings and those you are absorbing from the people around you. Take time alone to distinguish between the two before making any significant decisions.
belier.mantra: I choose who I am becoming with full clarity and intention.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries continues through your twelfth house, and the waning crescent light invites a deeper retreat from the noise of ordinary life. Neptune retrograde in this same hidden territory makes dreams vivid and symbolic, the boundary between sleep and waking thinner than usual. The Cancer Sun in your third house keeps language and thought alive even as the rest of your world turns quietly inward. Listen to what emerges when you stop filling the silence.
taureau.love: Emotional honesty asks less of you today than emotional presence. Simply being available and unhurried is a profound offering under this waning crescent configuration. A partner may need to feel heard rather than answered.
taureau.work: Hidden or behind-the-scenes work continues to be your most productive arena. Research, archiving, finishing incomplete tasks, and reflecting on where your projects are truly headed all yield results worth having.
taureau.energy: Your energy is restorative today and asks to be used accordingly. Long baths, walks in natural surroundings, and early sleep are not indulgences but genuine necessities for the sensitive conditions of this lunar phase.
taureau.intuition: The twelfth house Moon deepens your access to non-rational knowing. Pay particular attention to symbols that repeat across dreams and waking life; your subconscious is assembling a message worth receiving.
taureau.mantra: I listen to what the silence is telling me.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries moves through your eleventh house at a waning crescent pace, and the brightness of collective aspiration dims toward something more personal and contemplative. Neptune retrograde in this zone continues to clarify which group connections carry real meaning and which were always more about the idea of belonging than actual belonging. The Cancer Sun grounds your second house, keeping your sense of material value and personal worth at the center of every social consideration.
gemeaux.love: A friendship or social bond that has been ambiguous for some time becomes easier to assess today. The waning crescent and Neptune's retrograde motion strip away the appeal of ambiguity; what is real tends to remain and what was only appealing in the abstract tends to quietly dissolve.
gemeaux.work: Team efforts benefit from honest conversation about shared goals. If a collective project is not delivering what it promised, this is a good day to have a calm, fact-based discussion about whether and how to redirect it.
gemeaux.energy: Social stimulation that once energized you may feel more draining today under the waning Moon. Give yourself permission to withdraw from unnecessary collective engagements and protect your mental reserves.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition about other people's true motives and the real state of your social connections is sharp and reliable today. What you sense beneath the surface of a group dynamic is almost certainly accurate.
gemeaux.mantra: I belong to what is real and release what was only an idea.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon continues through Aries at 24 degrees, still in your tenth house, and the waning crescent phase brings a gentler and less confrontational energy than yesterday's quarter tension. Neptune retrograde in your career zone is no longer a sudden revelation but a sustained, quiet inquiry into the authenticity of your professional direction. Your Sun in your own sign supports you with emotional clarity even when external circumstances remain uncertain. You are doing important inner work, even when no one can see it.
cancer.love: With Mercury retrograde still moving through your sign, unspoken feelings continue to need careful tending. A conversation that felt too charged yesterday may open more easily today under the softer crescent light. Choose timing over urgency.
cancer.work: A professional situation that felt destabilizing yesterday begins to make a different kind of sense today. The fog does not lift completely, but your instincts about what actually needs to change become more trustworthy with each passing day.
cancer.energy: The waning crescent calls for restoration rather than exertion. Your emotional and physical reserves benefit from gentle activity, nourishing food, and early rest. The effort you save now will power the clarity you need next week.
cancer.intuition: Career-related intuitions continue to deepen and sharpen under Neptune's retrograde in your tenth house. If you have had a persistent feeling about your public direction that logic has been overriding, today that feeling becomes harder to dismiss.
cancer.mantra: I trust the quiet certainty growing inside me.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries moves through your ninth house with a waning crescent glow, and the philosophical questioning Neptune's retrograde began yesterday now settles into something more personal and specific. You are no longer asking whether your beliefs are true in general; you are asking whether they are true for you. The Cancer Sun continues to nourish your twelfth house, adding a layer of private reflection that makes even the most outward-facing questions feel intimate.
lion.love: A partner's worldview or personal philosophy comes into focus today in ways that either deepen your connection or clarify a genuine incompatibility. Neither outcome is the wrong one; the clarity itself has value regardless of where it leads.
lion.work: Educational, publishing, or outreach-oriented work benefits from a thoughtful reconsideration of its underlying premises. The best revision work often feels like destruction first and only reveals itself as construction in retrospect.
lion.energy: The Aries Moon gives your fire a directional quality even in its waning phase, pointing you toward the questions that most need answering rather than the tasks that most need doing. Follow that instinct rather than your task list today.
lion.intuition: Your intuition about the underlying truth of a belief or a long-term plan is especially clear today. The sense that something you have been building is built on sand deserves to be explored, not suppressed.
lion.mantra: I question what I believe and keep only what is truly mine.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries continues moving through your eighth house under a waning crescent sky, and the emotional depth stirred by yesterday's Last Quarter has not dissipated but rather deepened into something more considered and less urgent. Neptune retrograde in this transformative zone continues its work of dissolving whatever illusions have surrounded shared finances or the psychological dynamics of your closest bonds. The Cancer Sun in your eleventh house reminds you that community and friendship can be a source of genuine support during this inward passage.
vierge.love: A conversation about shared resources or emotional investment that began yesterday may continue today with more warmth and less tension. The waning crescent softens the edges of what was sharp and allows understanding to move at a pace that feels safe for both parties.
vierge.work: Financial or contractual review remains the primary focus. Do not rush toward resolution; the retrograde asks you to sit with complexity a little longer until a genuinely clear picture emerges. Premature conclusions are the main risk.
vierge.energy: Your earth element grounds you even in the midst of deep psychic and emotional processing. A walk in a garden or park, or time spent tending to something growing, reconnects you to your native stability and quiet strength.
vierge.intuition: Your intuition continues to speak clearly and specifically about shared financial or emotional dynamics. If something has not added up in a close relationship or a financial partnership, today brings another piece of the picture into view.
vierge.mantra: I stay with the complexity long enough to find the truth.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Moon moves to 24 degrees Aries in your seventh house as the waning crescent settles in, and the disorienting clarity of yesterday's Neptune retrograde station has begun to integrate into something more workable. You can see a relationship more honestly now, and while the view is not always comfortable, it is useful. The Cancer Sun in your tenth house maintains a steady reminder that your public life and private relationships are deeply connected, and that clarity in one always eventually illuminates the other.
balance.love: The honest view of a relationship that the Last Quarter and Neptune retrograde opened up yesterday can now be processed with more patience and less urgency. What you saw is real; how you choose to respond to it is still yours to shape.
balance.work: Professional partnerships and negotiations benefit from a more honest and less idealistic approach today. You may find that being straightforward about your actual needs and limits is more productive than navigating carefully around them.
balance.energy: The waning crescent phase works in your favor today, allowing you to release social and professional tensions that have been accumulating. The act of letting go is itself a form of energy management.
balance.intuition: Your intuition about the true state of a partnership or close collaboration continues to sharpen. Trust the steady signal rather than the louder and more immediate noise of what someone says versus how it feels.
balance.mantra: I see what is real and respond with courage and grace.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries continues through your sixth house and the waning crescent phase begins its quiet balsamic work, encouraging release of what no longer serves your daily wellbeing. Neptune retrograde in this zone of routine and health continues to dissolve the illusions you may have held about the sustainability of your current habits. The Cancer Sun in your ninth house pulls your perspective toward meaning and purpose, connecting the question of how you spend your days to the deeper question of why.
scorpion.love: The day-to-day rhythms and small habits of a shared life come into focus again today. What feels nourishing in your domestic or daily dynamic, and what has become a quiet drain? This is a useful question to sit with rather than immediately answer.
scorpion.work: Letting go of an inefficient or outdated work habit is more powerful today than adopting a new one. The waning crescent is a time for conscious release, and the most productive thing you can do may be to stop doing something that has not been working.
scorpion.energy: Your physical energy is gentler and more diffuse than usual today. Prioritize the tasks that genuinely require attention over the ones that simply feel urgent, and trust that a quieter pace serves your Scorpionic depth.
scorpion.intuition: Your body carries important information today about what is and is not working in your daily life. A persistent physical sensation, not necessarily pain, but a consistent signal from your nervous system, deserves honest interpretation.
scorpion.mantra: I release the habit that costs me more than it gives me.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries moves through your fifth house under a waning crescent sky, and the creative and romantic terrain that Neptune retrograde has been reshaping since yesterday now shows its quieter, more considered contours. You are moving from the excitement of asking the question toward the more demanding work of living with the answer. The Cancer Sun in your eighth house continues to add emotional depth and intensity to what might otherwise be a straightforward creative revision.
sagittaire.love: Romantic expectations that felt important to examine yesterday may today settle into a more patient and curious mode. Who is this person beyond the story you have told yourself about them? This question, asked with genuine openness, is the beginning of real intimacy.
sagittaire.work: A creative project benefits from another day of thoughtful revision rather than bold new direction. The ideas that survive the waning crescent scrutiny are the ones that truly belong in your work; trust the editing process.
sagittaire.energy: The waning crescent in your fifth house can paradoxically deepen your creative focus by removing the pressure to produce. When the need to impress falls away, the work that remains is often the best you have ever done.
sagittaire.intuition: Your intuition continues to offer vivid and surprising creative signals. The impulse that seems too strange or too personal to follow today may turn out to be the most honest and original thing you could have made.
sagittaire.mantra: I create from the truest and most personal part of myself.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Moon continues through 24 degrees Aries in your fourth house as the waning crescent brings a quieter and more inward quality to the domestic and ancestral themes Neptune retrograde has been activating. Yesterday's unsettling clarity about your home or family foundations has begun to integrate into something more workable. The Cancer Sun in your seventh house maintains the pressure of a mirror held up by your closest relationship, asking you to see yourself and your roots with full honesty.
capricorne.love: A partner continues to reflect important truths about your foundations back to you. Rather than defending or explaining yourself today, try listening to what that reflection reveals about where you have been operating on assumption rather than genuine understanding.
capricorne.work: Home-based work improves when the emotional fog from recent days is addressed directly rather than worked around. A brief but honest conversation about the domestic atmosphere may clear the air enough to allow genuine focus.
capricorne.energy: The waning crescent phase and Neptune's lingering presence in your fourth house call for domestic simplicity today. Clearing a physical space, preparing a nourishing meal, or tending to something tangible at home restores your grounded Capricorn equilibrium.
capricorne.intuition: Intuitions about your ancestral inheritance, your family patterns, and the emotional structures you carry forward from your early life are at an unusual depth of clarity today. What has been passed down that no longer serves the life you are building?
capricorne.mantra: I inherit what is valuable and consciously release what is not.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries moves through your third house under the waning crescent sky, and the mental clarity that Neptune retrograde has been demanding since yesterday is beginning to emerge from the initial fog. You can see more clearly where a plan, a communication strategy, or a local dynamic has been built on wishful thinking rather than solid assessment. Pluto retrograde in your own sign continues to deepen the internal restructuring of how you think and who you are in conversation with the world.
verseau.love: A conversation with someone close today has the quality of quiet honesty that is only possible when the urgency of the Last Quarter has settled. What you could not say clearly yesterday may now be expressible with both truth and tenderness.
verseau.work: Written work, editing, and the refinement of existing plans and documents are strongly favored today. The waning crescent is an ideal phase for polishing rather than creating, and a second or third draft under this Moon is often dramatically superior to the first.
verseau.energy: Mental energy flows steadily today if you give it direction. Choose one area of communication or planning to clarify and work methodically through it rather than spreading your attention across several unrelated problems.
verseau.intuition: Your intuition about the quality and accuracy of your own thinking is unusually sharp today. The sense that a particular argument or plan has a flaw you cannot yet name deserves to be followed until the flaw becomes visible.
verseau.mantra: I refine my ideas until they are as true as I can make them.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon at 24 degrees Aries continues through your second house under the waning crescent sky, and the financial and material questioning that Neptune retrograde began yesterday has deepened from acute discomfort into genuine discernment. Your ruling planet's retrograde is doing its slow, essential work: stripping away the romantic haze from your relationship with money, security, and personal worth, leaving something more honest and more durable in its place. This process is uncomfortable by design.
poissons.love: The question of what you truly value in a close relationship continues to develop today. Beneath the practical and material surface, a deeper question about emotional security and whether a bond genuinely nourishes you is asking to be honestly addressed.
poissons.work: Financial clarity continues to improve gradually under Neptune's retrograde. A review of your income sources, spending patterns, or resource allocation may reveal an imbalance that has been invisible while Neptune was direct. Now it can be addressed.
poissons.energy: Your energy today has a recuperative and restorative quality. Trust the impulse to slow down, simplify, and release rather than pushing forward into new territory. The waning crescent asks for completion, not initiation.
poissons.intuition: Your intuition about your own material worth and financial situation continues to deepen in accuracy. The feeling that a financial arrangement or a professional valuation of your work is not reflecting your true worth is worth acting on once the retrograde clears.
poissons.mantra: I am worth more than the haze allowed me to see.
poissons.author: Sibylle
